summary: Comprehensive testing of Arcolia's new username/password authentication system completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend authentication flows working correctly including signup, login, email verification, and Guild Hall access. Username display instead of wallet addresses confirmed working.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal close button has overlay interception issue
ui_bugs.impact: Minor - modal can still be closed by clicking outside

passed_tests: Landing page displays correctly with Enter Arcolia button
Clicking Enter Arcolia shows login form with proper medieval styling
Can switch to signup form via Create Account link
Signup form has all required fields (username, email, password, confirm password)
Signup API endpoint works perfectly (/api/auth/signup)
Email verification API endpoint works (/api/auth/verify-email)
Login API endpoint works (/api/auth/login)
Password validation working (passwords do not match error)
Email verification requirement enforced before login
Guild Hall displays after successful login with beautiful medieval design
Guild Hall shows username instead of wallet address correctly
Connect Wallet button appears and opens modal in Guild Hall
Wallet connect modal displays correctly with MetaMask option
Navigation areas (Sanctuary, Treasury) show as locked without wallet
Coming soon areas (Archives, Council Chamber) display with lock icons
Leave Guild button in header works for logout
All form navigation (back to gate, back to login) working
All backend API endpoints tested with 100% success rate
JWT token authentication working correctly
Wallet linking/unlinking APIs working
Duplicate email/username validation working
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI fix needed: Modal close button overlay interception in wallet connect modal. Consider adding force=true to click or adjusting z-index.
